mapper.insert: insert into setmeal_dish (id, setmeal_id, dish_id, name, price, copies, sort, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUES (#{id},#{setmealId},#{dishId},#{name},#{price},#{copies},#{sort},#{createTime},#{updateTime},#{createUser},#{updateUser});
mapper.select: select * from setmeal_dish where setmeal_id=#{setmealId} order by sort,update_time desc;
mapper.update: update setmeal_dish set is_deleted=1 where setmeal_id=#{setmealId}
mapper.select: select max(sort) from setmeal_dish where setmeal_id=#{setmealId};
select sort from setmeal_dish where setmeal_id=#{setmealId} and dish_id=#{dishId};
mapper.delete: delete from setmeal_dish where setmeal_id=#{setmealId} and is_deleted=1;
